title: Management effectiveness score computation
acceptance_criteria: Exports `computeManagementEffectiveness(pool: Pool, personalityId: string, tradeDateISO: string): Promise<number | null>`

Query: SELECT exit_reason, pnl_pct FROM paper_trades WHERE personality_id = $1 AND status = 'closed' AND pnl_abs IS NOT NULL AND exit_reason IS NOT NULL AND entry_time >= $2 AND entry_time < $3 — fully parameterized
Sargable time filter: $2 = tradeDateISO + 'T00:00:00.000Z' (start of day UTC), $3 = start of next day UTC
Exit reason scoring map (exact values): TARGET = 1.0, TSL = 0.5, EOD = 0.0, SL = -1.0, DAILY_LOSS_CAP = -0.5, MANUAL = 0.0, TIME = 0.0
Any exit_reason value not in the scoring map is treated as 0.0 and logged as a warning (open-ended extensibility without crashing)
Weighted average formula: sum(score * |pnl_pct|) / sum(|pnl_pct|) — weighted by the absolute P&L magnitude so a large winning TARGET exit dominates more than a small one
Returns NULL when zero closed trades — no division by zero
Returns NULL when sum of |pnl_pct| weights is 0 (all trades have pnl_pct = 0) — avoids 0/0
All pg NUMERIC pnl_pct values are cast with Number() and guarded with Number.isFinite() before arithmetic — non-finite rows are logged and excluded
The return value is in the range [-1.0, 1.0]; higher is better management execution
No default exports — named exports only
output_format: code plus plain English explanation of every non-obvious decision
